UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Strength card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Strength card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Strength card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Strength card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Strength card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Strength card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the heroism, courage, and endurance embodied by Heracles in his struggle with the Nemean lion.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the womanly calm grip or the flowers as they are secondary elements to the central theme of strength.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Strength card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, uilleann pipes, ethereal, triumphant, hopeful, instrumental

Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Strength card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the savage, mindless rage of Polyphemus, his brute force and lack of compassion
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing Odysseus' escape as the main focus, instead focus on the danger and potential chaos Polyphemus represents
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Strength card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, reversed, introspective, contemplative, subtle, instrumental

Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Strength card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the wisdom gained through life's battles as Beowulf learns vulnerability and gentler strength, nurturing a wary companion.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the warrior aspect, instead focus on the transformation and contemplation in his later years.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Strength card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic Ambient Orchestral, Harp, Strings, Flute, Uilleann Pipes, Ethereal, Majestic, Triumphant, instrumental
